===Pokémon Generations===
[[File:Burgh PG.png|thumb|250px|Burgh in [[Pokémon Generations]]]]
Burgh appeared in ''[[PG13|The Uprising]]'', in which he was seen outside [[N's Castle]] trying to stop the [[Seven Sages]]. Together with several other [[Unova]] [[Gym Leader]]s, he battled the many {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}s to prevent them from achieving [[Team Plasma]]'s goals.
